company: Florida investor-owned utilities (energy conservation cost recovery)
doc_type: final order on conservation cost recovery
source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-2019-0504-FOF-EG (Final Order), Docket No. 20190002-EG, 'Energy conservation cost recovery clause', issued November 25, 2019 (11 pp) — the Commission's annual review of energy-conservation / demand-side-management program cost recovery, approving the conservation cost-recovery amounts, tariffs, and factors for 2020 for Florida's investor-owned utilities. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 11112-2019 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2019/11112-2019.pdf).

company: Florida Power & Light Company (FPL), Duke Energy Florida (DEF), Tampa Electric Company (TECO), Florida Public Utilities Company (FPUC)
doc_type: final order on fuel cost recovery
source_note: Order No. PSC-2025-0436-FOF-EI, Florida PSC, Docket No. 20250001-EI (24 pp) — Final Order Approving Expenditures and True-Up Amounts for Fuel Adjustment Factors; GPIF Targets, Ranges, and Rewards; and Projected Expenditures and True-Up Amounts for Capacity Cost Recovery Factors, for the state's major electric IOUs (FPL, DEF, TECO, FPUC). This is Florida's annual fuel-cost-recovery-clause track (docket suffix 0001-EI), distinct from the Nuclear/storm-cost-recovery track (suffix 0009/0010-EI) already in the corpus — the only other 0001-EI instance held is from 2012. Issued November 24, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2025/15230-2025.pdf (also served at floridapsc.com, the same commission's current-generation domain).
